title: Build great solutions with the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework
summary: Learn how to design and build secure, scalable, high-performing solutions in Azure using the pillars of the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework.

sections.title: Build great solutions with the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework
sections.summary: Learn how to design and build secure, scalable, high-performing solutions in Azure using the pillars of the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework.

lessons.title: Introduction to the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework
lessons.content_md:
Learn how using key principles throughout your cloud architecture can help you design and build a solid architectural foundation that you can continuously improve.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-introduction/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Introduction to the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework

lessons.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Reliability
lessons.content_md:
Apply reliability guidance in your architecture to improve your workload's availability and resilience.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-reliability/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Security
lessons.content_md:
Discover the tools that Azure provides to help you design a secure environment throughout your infrastructure, data, network, and applications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-security/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Cost Optimization
lessons.content_md:
Apply cost optimization guidance in your architecture to sustain and improve your return on investment (ROI).

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-cost-optimization/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Cost Optimization

lessons.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Operational Excellence
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to design an Azure architecture that uses modern practices and gives you full visibility into what's happening in your environment.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-operational-excellence/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Operational Excellence

lessons.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Performance Efficiency
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to optimize your workload to meet performance requirements while balancing costs, reliability, and security.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-well-architected-performance-efficiency/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework - Performance Efficiency

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Build great solutions with the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Build great solutions with the Microsoft Azure Well-Architected Framework**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
